title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Urban Company
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company family as a Frontend Developer in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company:
Urban Company is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company!
